creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
On 02/07/14 10:31, Max Sterling wrote:
> Can you try this patch?
>
>

Already did: I made those exact same additions to my local copy and it 
works.  There might be more qt4 packages required. Unfortunately, I 
didn't go abut the changes 100% scientifically (rebuilding after each 
single addition), but I think we'll need to do a build on a blank system 
to be sure anyway.

I also have qt4-assistant listed in mine, but I'm not positive it's 
necessary, since I added several packages at once before rebuilding.

Thanks,

     JB
